_doc: Firewall denylist for the public portfolio. Matching runs over CANONICALIZED text (unicode-normalized, homoglyph-folded, zero-width-stripped, HTML-entity + percent-decoded, tag-stripped, leet-folded, spacing-collapsed) — see firewall-scan.mjs canonicalVariants(). So you do NOT need every spacing/hyphen variant here; collapse handles them. Bias: a leak is catastrophic (auto-publish), a false block just skips one nightly. When in doubt, block. Every removal is a reviewed decision. Hardened 2026-06-19 against Grok+Codex adversarial findings.
_doc_regex: Internal file artifacts match in FILE-TOKEN form (underscore/hyphen joined, OR spaced with a file extension) — 'single source of truth' is legitimate English; SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md / 'SOURCE OF TRUTH.md' are the internal file. Regexes run over canonical lowered + collapsed variants.
_doc_contextGated: Short internal acronyms that collide with common words/onomatopoeia/graphics terms. Block ONLY when a QC-domain word appears within `window` chars — catches the internal taxonomy leak without bricking 'FOM bias' / 'DRI driver' / 'arf'.
